jsonLd.title: Ajio is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ajio. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About Ajio:
Ajio is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ajio!
